draft_activation_preconditions: Route the pack truthfully through PLANS.md, the canonical gate map, this leaves ledger, and the execution log before Gate 236 work begins.
Reread the canonical vocabulary file before editing any durable field, class, or gate naming.
Bootstrap a repo-local environment via repo doctrine `make install` / `uv sync --extra dev` before running gate validation.
If sandbox dependency resolution fails later, use the operator-supplied dependency bundle and attached bootstrap instructions instead of changing repo dependency law.
notes: This ledger was written as a draft pack only because the operator asked for gates/leaves first and the repo currently has no active pack routed.
The operator brief is behavioural authority for the correction, but canonical vocabulary remains naming authority until a later executed leaf changes it lawfully.
The six-gate sequence is fixed by the operator-supplied execution brief and was preserved exactly.
Git metadata is unavailable in the uploaded workspace copy; execution receipts record command and file evidence instead.
